title: Regulatory Clock Profile
description: Defines regulatory deadline clocks for a jurisdiction/LOB combination. Published as a VKAS artifact and consumed by Enstellar's clock engine.

profile_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this clock profile, e.g. clk_ma_medicare_2024

jurisdiction.description: Regulatory jurisdiction code. ISO 3166-2 state code or 'federal', e.g. US-CA, US-TX, federal

lob.description: Line of business governed by this profile

display_name.description: Human-readable label for this clock profile

regulatory_citations.description: Regulatory basis for the clocks in this profile

effective_date.description: Date from which this profile is effective

supersedes.description: profile_id of the clock profile this one supersedes

id.description: Unique clock identifier within this profile, e.g. standard_pa_determination

name.description: Human-readable clock name, e.g. Standard PA Determination Clock

trigger_event.description: AsyncAPI event name that starts this clock, e.g. sim.case.lifecycle/CaseCreated

trigger_guard.description: Optional CEL expression that must be true for the trigger event to start this clock

deadline_hours.description: Number of hours (calendar or business) from trigger to deadline

calendar.description: Whether deadline_hours counts all hours (calendar) or business hours only (business)

business_hours_ref.description: Reference to a business-hours schedule definition when calendar == business

breach_event.description: AsyncAPI event name published when the deadline is breached, e.g. sim.clock/ClockBreached

warning_hours.description: Optional: hours before the deadline at which a warning event is published

warning_event.description: AsyncAPI event name published for the warning, e.g. sim.clock/ClockBreachWarning. Required when warning_hours is set.

reset_events.description: Events that reset (stop) this clock before the deadline, e.g. when determination is recorded

pause_events.description: Start/end event pairs that pause clock counting (e.g. waiting on member information)
